Parent company of SURE Mechanical, Cincinnati Air Conditioning Company & Thermolinear

Three trusted companies. One standard for mechanical excellence.

SURE Group brings together SURE Mechanical, Cincinnati Air Conditioning Company, and Thermolinear to deliver HVAC construction, mechanical fabrication, service, and environmental control solutions for critical facilities across the Tri-State region.

Request a QuoteExplore Services
Cinematic mechanical construction
Hospitals • Banks • Universities • Government • Industrial
3 Specialized Companies
85+ Years of Legacy Service
Certified Minority-Owned
24/7 Service Support
Southern Ohio, Northern Kentucky & Tri-State Region
Unified capacity

Built to Deliver More Under One Roof

Specialized companies aligned around engineering discipline, field craftsmanship, responsive service, and accountability.

01

SURE Mechanical

Commercial HVAC and mechanical contractor specializing in mechanical design, fabrication, installation, engineering, sheet metal ductwork, hydronic piping, welding, BIM coordination, LEED/sustainable projects, and large-scale public and institutional work.

HVAC ConstructionFabricationInstallationBIM
Explore SURE Mechanical
02

Cincinnati Air Conditioning Company

A design-build commercial and industrial HVAC company founded in 1938 with deep experience in engineered HVAC systems, process piping, building automation, commercial refrigeration, service, preventative maintenance, and custom mechanical systems.

Design-BuildServiceProcess PipingAutomation
Explore Cincinnati Air Conditioning Company
03

Thermolinear

A custom environmental control systems manufacturer specializing in modular environmental rooms, dry rooms, clean rooms, growth chambers, environmental chambers, custom heating/cooling equipment, installation, testing, and commissioning.

Clean RoomsDry RoomsGrowth ChambersEnvironmental Control
Explore Thermolinear
Mechanical scope

Full-Service Mechanical Solutions from Design to Long-Term Support

⌁

HVAC Construction

Coordinated commercial HVAC construction for critical facilities, renovations, infrastructure upgrades, and complex occupied environments.

SURE MechanicalCincinnati Air
⌁

Mechanical Design & Engineering

Engineering-led system planning, constructability input, and design-build support for performance, maintainability, and lifecycle value.

SURE MechanicalCincinnati Air
⌁

Fabrication & Prefabrication

Sheet metal, piping, welding, and prefabricated assemblies that improve quality, shorten schedules, and reduce disruption on site.

SURE Mechanical
⌁

Installation

Field installation teams experienced with hydronic piping, ductwork, equipment setting, rooftop units, AHUs, chillers, and building renovations.

SURE MechanicalCincinnati Air
⌁

Equipment Services

Responsive commercial HVAC service, diagnostics, repairs, commissioning support, and system performance troubleshooting.

Cincinnati Air
⌁

Service Agreements

Preventative maintenance and planned service programs built around uptime, energy performance, and facility risk reduction.

Cincinnati Air
⌁

Process Piping

Commercial and industrial process piping support for manufacturing, institutional, and specialized mechanical environments.

Cincinnati AirSURE Mechanical
⌁

Building Automation

Control strategies and building automation support to connect equipment, sequences, monitoring, and long-term operations.

Industries

Built for Demanding Environments

Healthcare

Mechanical systems where patient comfort, infection control, uptime, and phased work in occupied facilities are mission critical.

Facility concerns
Uptime • Redundancy • Indoor air quality • Infection control

Education

HVAC and mechanical renovations that support learning environments, campus standards, budgets, and seasonal schedule constraints.

Facility concerns
Phased renovations • Occupant comfort • Energy use • Schedule certainty

Government

Public-sector mechanical work with documentation, coordination, safety, and accountable delivery at the center of the process.

Facility concerns
Procurement requirements • Documentation • Durability • Safety

Commercial

Design-build, retrofit, and service support for offices, mixed-use properties, banks, corporate campuses, and critical business facilities.

Facility concerns
Tenant comfort • Maintainability • Energy performance • Business continuity

Industrial

Robust mechanical and process support for demanding production, logistics, laboratory, and equipment-intensive operations.

Facility concerns
Process loads • Reliability • Safety • Custom systems

Research & Laboratory

Precision environmental control, ventilation, specialty rooms, and commissioning-minded delivery for research environments.

Facility concerns
Temperature control • Humidity control • Cleanliness • Commissioning

Senior Living

Comfort-focused mechanical systems for residential-care environments that still demand commercial-grade reliability and service.

Facility concerns
Resident comfort • Indoor air quality • Low disruption • Maintenance access

Energy & Utilities

Mechanical and HVAC support for utility and energy environments where coordination, safety, and durable performance matter.

Facility concerns
Secure access • Reliability • Site coordination • Critical infrastructure

Why SURE Group

Capacity, Craftsmanship, and Accountability

Engineering-Led Execution

Project teams plan around constructability, performance, coordination, and lifecycle value before work reaches the field.

Skilled Fabrication & Installation

Fabrication, sheet metal, piping, welding, and installation crews execute with commercial-grade precision.

Service Beyond the Build

Long-term maintenance, repairs, diagnostics, and retrofit support protect critical HVAC investments.

Inclusive Workforce Development

SURE Group expands opportunity while building the skilled technical workforce the region needs.

Next step

Built by Skilled Teams. Backed by a Safety-First Culture.

We invest in craft, apprenticeships, inclusive workforce development, and field leadership that protects people and projects.
